Clicker Games (140)

Welcome to the Clicker games hub on PlayArcadeX. Here you'll find 140 free clicker games — satisfying idle and incremental games where every tap counts, numbers keep climbing and upgrades unlock even bigger rewards. Popular picks right now include Kill The King, The Simple Piano, Rabbit Punch Rabbit, Draw Bridge Puzzle 2 and Super Mario Bros Movie. Every game runs straight in your browser, with no download, no installation and no sign-up. Just click and play on your phone, tablet or computer.

About Clicker Games

Clicker games are satisfying idle and incremental games where every tap counts, numbers keep climbing and upgrades unlock even bigger rewards. On PlayArcadeX we keep this collection fresh, adding new clicker titles regularly so there's always something new to try. Whether you have five minutes or an hour, you'll find a clicker game here that fits.

All 140 clicker games on this page are completely free and work on both desktop and mobile. If you enjoy clicker games, bookmark this page and check back often — the lineup keeps growing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are these Clicker games free to play?

Yes. Every clicker game on PlayArcadeX is 100% free to play, with no download, no installation and no payment required. Just open a game and start playing.

Can I play Clicker games on mobile?

Absolutely. All clicker games here run directly in your mobile browser on Android and iOS, as well as on tablets and desktop computers — no app needed.

What are the best Clicker games to start with?

Great starting points include Kill The King, The Simple Piano, Rabbit Punch Rabbit. From there, browse the full list of 140 clicker games above and find your favourites.
